Container.Name: RemotePanel
Container.Overview: RemotePanel is a self-hosted homelab control panel for SSH/SFTP machines, SMB shares, file transfers, terminal sessions, stats, Wake-on-LAN, power actions, UPS/NUT shutdown automation, backups, audit logs, and network discovery.

Config.Name: Host ARP Table
Config.Description: Read-only host ARP table used by network discovery to prefill MAC addresses.

Config.Name: APP_SECRET_KEY
Config.Description: Required stable secret used to encrypt saved credentials. Generate with: openssl rand -base64 48

Config.Name: APP_LISTEN_PORT
Config.Description: Port used by RemotePanel inside the container. In Unraid host networking this is the web port.

Config.Name: COOKIE_SECURE
Config.Description: Set true only when RemotePanel is served over HTTPS.

Config.Name: SMB Require Signing
Config.Description: Set false on trusted networks if your SMB server allows unsigned SMB and you want more speed.
